title: 22:09 ГўВЂВ” March 16, 2022
body_text:
22:09 ГўВЂВ” March 16, 2022
Update to Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597
We updated the Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597. These changes were also made in the Wires application.
Document Library
Status
Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions
3597
We removed sanction requirements for the following countries:
Anguilla
Comoros
Dominica
Ecuador
Ghana
Nigeria
Seychelles
Tunisia
We added sanction requirements for the following countries:
Ethiopia
Eritrea
Jordan
Kosovo
We updated the sanction requirements and/or language for the following countries:
Afghanistan
We added: ГўВЂВњIn addition, the correspondent bank, non-Canadian sanctions (e.g. the U.S. OFAC rules), and/or other laws may prohibit a pending non-CAD currency transaction involving Afghanistan. If this transaction is submitted and rejected, the responsible financial institution will be notified. Consult with your compliance officer and, if needed, Global Affairs Canada, for additional information.ГўВЂВќ
Burundi
We removed:  ГўВЂВњIn addition, the correspondent bank, non-Canadian sanctions (e.g., the U.S. OFAC rules), and/or other laws may prohibit a pending non-CAD currency transaction involving Burundi. If this transaction is submitted and rejected, the responsible financial institution will be notified. Consult with your compliance officer and, if needed, Global Affairs Canada, for additional information.ГўВЂВќ
Russia
We added ГўВЂВњPlease note that Canada has issued extensive sanctions against individuals and entities in Russia in light of recent developments in Ukraine. Please consult Global Affairs Canada for the most current updates and conduct due diligence as required.ГўВЂВќ
Ukraine
We added ГўВЂВњPlease note that Canada has issued sanctions against certain Ukrainian individuals as well as broad prohibitions for transactions to the Luhansk and Donetsk regions. Please consult Global Affairs Canada for the most current updates and conduct due diligence as required.ГўВЂВќ
We updated the payment instructions for the following countries:
Barbados
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of paymentГўВЂВќ requirement
Bolivia
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary account number, full name, and address requirementГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of paymentГўВЂВќ requirement
Cambodia
Added ГўВЂВњthis is input on line 1 of payment detailsГўВЂВќ to the Purpose of payment requirement.
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary mobile number is required. This is input on line 2 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Columbia
Added ГўВЂВњThis is input on line 1 of payment details. The format is TAXID followed by a numeric code of 10-12 digits. No spaces between letters and numbersГўВЂВќ to the Tax ID (NIT) (10 Digits) requirement.
Dominican Republic
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary account type required as follows:/ACC/TYPE current or /ACC/TYPE savings. this is entered on line 2 of payment detailsГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary phone number is required. This is entered on line 3 of payment detailsГўВЂВќ
Updated For Individuals: ГўВЂВњ(Nationals): Beneficiary passport number or 11 digit card number Tax ID (Cedula) should not be sent without special characters. leading zeros are required to meet the 11 digit format. This is entered on line 4 in payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Updated For individuals (non-nationals): ГўВЂВњBeneficiary passport number 9 characters, alphanumeric should be sent without any special characters. Leading zeros are required to meet the 9 digit format. This is entered on line 4 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Updated For institutions: ГўВЂВњRNC Tax ID (Registro Mercantil) 9 digits numeric, sent without special characters Leading zeros are required to meet the 9 digit format. This is entered in line 4 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњis required. This is entered on line 1 of payment detailsГўВЂВќ to Purpose of payment requirement.
Jamaica
Added ГўВЂВњBank and branch code required. This is entered in payment details on line 1.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary account type formatted as follows: /ACC/TYPE CA or /ACC/TYPE SA This is entered on line 2 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњFor payments of value JMD 1,000,000 or greater to Scotiabank Jamaica branches only, the account number format must include the 5 digit Branch/ Transit Number followed by the 9 digit account number (leading zeros should be added if necessary to ensure the  account number is 9 digits)ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњrecommendedГўВЂВќ to Purpose of payment requirement
Kazakhstan
Added ГўВЂВњIndividual/Business Identification code IIN/BIN is required.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњSingle Payment Classification code EKNP is required this is 10 digits.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњNote: See Form 9471, Kazakhstan - Purpose of Payment (Single Payment Classification Code), for more information.ГўВЂВќ
Malaysia
Added ГўВЂВњis required and should be as descriptive as possible to avoid rejections.ГўВЂВќ To Purpose of payment requirement.
Beneficiary phone number is recommended in payment details line 2 prefixed with the words Phone Number. If the payment is financial in nature, the phone number is mandatoryГўВЂВќ
Mexico
Updated the CLABE instructions to read ГўВЂВњ18 digit CLABE number required for beneficiary account This is entered in the beneficiary account field.ГўВЂВќ
Morocco
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary account RIB must be 24 digits. First 3 digits bank code, next 3 digits location code, next 16 digits beneficiary account number, last 2 digits are check digits.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of payment required. This should be entered in Payment details line 1.ГўВЂВќ
Nepal
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of paymentГўВЂВќ
Paraguay
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of paymentГўВЂВќ
Serbia
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose of payment required. Enter on line 1 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Uganda
Added ГўВЂВњAll 4 lines in payment details must be populated to ensure the purpose is reported in the correct line. In the absence of other information regarding the payment, the purpose of payment should be repeated in lines 1-3 of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњBeneficiary account number, beneficiary name and full beneficiary address is required. PO Boxes are not acceptable.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњcode. This is entered on line 4 of payment details. example Purpose of Payment: XXX where XXX is the valid purpose code.ГўВЂВќ to the Purpose of payment requirement.
Added ГўВЂВњNote: See Form 9415, Uganda ГўВЂВ“  Purpose of Payment Codes, for more information.ГўВЂВќ
United Arab Emirates
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose code formatted as follows: /REF/XXX where XXX = the 3 digit purpose of payment code. This must be included on the 1st line of payment details.ГўВЂВќ
Added ГўВЂВњPurpose code must be consistent with reason for paymentГўВЂВќ
Revised
Questions
Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
